pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to target JDK 21.
Add JAX-WS runtime dependency required because Java EE modules were removed in JDK 11 and are not included in JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime for javax.xml.ws classes if the application uses JAX-WS features without an explicit implementation dependency.
